content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1/5.6.3 WARN — Custom star-rating gate routes ≥4-star users to a direct `itms-apps://…action=write-review` URL while diverting unhappy users to a feedback site (RatingGateView.swift:16–23), bypassing `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview`; description.txt also says "rate us 5 stars!".
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits filtering or manipulating reviews — pre-screening sentiment and only sending happy users to the App Store is a classic dark pattern under 5.6.3, and direct write-review links instead of the system `requestReview` API compound it. I found no `SKStoreReviewController` usage anywhere in the project, so the custom gate is the sole review path. Replace the gate with the system review prompt, remove the sentiment fork, and drop the "rate us 5 stars" line from the metadata.
